stemHtml: With respect to the inherent satellite errors and User Equivalent Range Error (UERE) in GNSS, which of the following statements is true?

options.a: Satellite clock errors are more significant than ionospheric effects.
options.b: Ionospheric effects are more significant than satellite clock errors.
options.c: The user equivalent range error is the difference between errors due to ionospheric effects and satellite clock errors.
options.d: Satellite clocks are so accurate that clock errors can practically be ignored.
